seo.title: Wholesale Lightboxes — Trade Pricing | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale lightboxes and illuminated cabinet signs for sign shops only. Edge-lit and backlit LED options, tensioned fabric or polycarbonate faces. Trade pricing, UL listed. We never sell retail.

data.subtitle: Illuminated cabinet signs engineered for uniform brightness, durability, and ease of maintenance. Standard cabinets, slim profiles, and tensioned fabric systems in any size or shape. Available exclusively to trade accounts.
data.image: Lightbox — illuminated cabinet sign on commercial building, night view

items.name: Standard Cabinet Lightbox
items.description: Traditional illuminated cabinet sign with internal LED modules and translucent polycarbonate or acrylic face. The workhorse of commercial signage. Wholesale trade pricing for sign shops.
items.image: Standard cabinet lightbox — illuminated commercial sign, storefront

items.name: Slim Profile Lightbox
items.description: Ultra-thin cabinet construction with edge-lit LED technology. Modern, sleek profile ideal for contemporary architecture and interior applications. Available exclusively to trade accounts.
items.image: Slim profile lightbox — thin edge-lit sign, modern building

items.name: Tensioned Fabric Lightbox
items.description: Aluminum frame with dye-sublimation printed fabric face stretched over a silicone edge system. Easy graphic changes for seasonal or evolving messaging. Wholesale direct to sign shops.
items.image: Tensioned fabric lightbox — vivid print, retail display

items.name: Double-Sided Lightbox
items.description: Cabinet with two illuminated faces for freestanding, pylon-mounted, or projecting installations. Maximum visibility from multiple directions. Trade pricing available.

items.title: Uniform LED Illumination
items.description: Internal LED modules engineered for even light distribution across the entire face. No hot spots, no dark corners, no uneven brightness.

items.title: Custom Sizes & Shapes
items.description: From small wayfinding boxes to large building-mounted cabinets. Rectangular, square, round, oval, or fully custom shapes.

items.title: Multiple Face Options
items.description: Polycarbonate, acrylic, tensioned fabric, or aluminum with routed graphics. Full-color printed, vinyl-applied, or push-through faces.

items.title: Changeable Graphics
items.description: Tensioned fabric systems allow graphic changes in minutes without tools. Ideal for businesses that update promotions or seasonal messaging.

items.title: UL Listed
items.description: All illuminated lightboxes are UL listed with complete documentation and labeling for code compliance and permitting.

items.title: Engineered Construction
items.description: Welded aluminum frames with structural integrity for any mounting application. Wind load calculations available for permitting.

data.heading: Tensioned Fabric Systems
data.content: The modern alternative to traditional lightbox faces. Dye-sublimation printed fabric stretches over a silicone edge system for a taut, wrinkle-free illuminated face that can be changed in minutes. Wholesale direct to sign shops.
data.image: Tensioned fabric lightbox — graphic change in progress, showing silicone edge system

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Engineered for uniform illumination, structural integrity, and long service life. Every lightbox ships ready to install. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.
data.image: Lightbox — internal view showing LED module layout and wiring

specs.label: Mounting
specs.value: Wall, pole, pylon, freestanding, or ceiling

specs.label: Electrical Access
specs.value: Hinged door, removable face, or rear access

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Lightboxes are the most versatile illuminated sign format. From small interior directories to large exterior building signs, the cabinet format handles it all. Wholesale direct to sign shops for all project types.

data.heading: Ready to Get Started?
data.description: Request a wholesale quote for your next project.
